markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on production, technical issues, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production:** 3 LLM gap refreshes are ready for review; 3 more are in review. The Sanity API key request for automated staging is pending a web team security review.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Process Improvements:** To streamline reviews, content will be flagged as "New" or "Refresh" in the production list, and AI-generated images will be commented on for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Strategy:** The DMI keyword research used topic competitors (e.g., MetricStreams) instead of direct business competitors to find higher-volume topics. Diligent has 100% AI visibility on key prompts, but this metric is highly volatile.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Migration:** The site migration is firming up for the week of Feb 23, with a 3-day publishing freeze. A planned internal taxonomy shift is not expected to impact SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)

## Topics

### Production & Process Improvements

  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [3 LLM gap refreshes are "Ready to Publish."](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [3 more are "In Review."](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [3 additional refreshes are in production, due by EOD Feb 13 or Feb 16.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Sanity API Key for Automated Staging:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Request:** An API key for automated staging from GrowthX's pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Frees up manual staging time for higher-level tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Diligent's web team requires more info on the Atlas/Sanity integration, citing past difficulties publishing from Optimizely.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [**Review Process Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Flagging Content Type:** Add a "New" or "Refresh" column to the production list to enable different review workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [**Flagging AI Images:** Add a comment to new AI-generated images for explicit approval.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Ensures brand alignment and avoids re-reviewing previously approved assets.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
          - [**Note:** GrowthX uses text overlays to prevent AI text hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**GRC Guide Publishing Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Problem:** A generic "structure tool crashing" error prevents publishing the main GRC guide in Optimizely.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Action:** Diligent's web team will attempt to troubleshoot and publish the guide.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Content Strategy & Keyword Research

  - [**Keyword Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [**Vaults Keywords:** Diligent is reviewing the list to extract top suggestions and add comments for a follow-up discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**DMI Keywords:** The research used topic competitors (e.g., MetricStreams) because direct business competitors lacked sufficient search volume for the subject matter.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [**AI Visibility & Organic Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [**Organic Traffic:** Growth is strong across most business units, especially ENT.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [**AI Visibility (7-day):**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
          - [100% visibility achieved on key library prompts, including "how to secure board document sharing and collaboration."](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
          - [Diligent is cited in all 5 sources for that prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
          - [**Observation:** AI visibility is highly volatile, enabling faster impact assessment than traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
          - [**Platform Discrepancy:** Google AI Overview citations are significantly higher than Google AI Mode, which is unusual compared to other clients.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Site Migration

  - [**Timeline:** Firming up for the week of Feb 23.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Publishing Freeze:** A 3-day freeze is planned for Wednesday–Friday of that week.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Taxonomy Shift:** An internal content topic shift is planned.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
      - [**SEO Impact:** Not expected to be significant, as URLs will remain unchanged.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [**Risk:** Potential for temporary, automated breadcrumb errors.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [Send Sanity API key integration details to Diligent.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
      - [Send the Optimizely link for the GRC guide publishing issue.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Implement "New" vs. "Refresh" flagging in the production list.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [Implement commenting on new AI-generated images for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Diligent:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Review the 3 "Ready to Publish" LLM gap refreshes on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [Add comments to the Vaults keyword research doc for discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Share GRC guide details with the web team for troubleshooting.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Grant Check access to Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
      - [Meet next week (Feb 20) and then transition to a bi-weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/grhsWWyp2LyssGx2igsuqikH7zzNQzz_?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
